package.name: go2w_slam_toolbox_bringup
package.description: Bringup package for 2D SLAM on the Unitree Go2W using slam_toolbox. Projects the Hesai PandarXT-16 PointCloud2 (/points_raw) into a 2D LaserScan (/scan) and feeds it to slam_toolbox to produce a /map occupancy grid. Assumes the slam-go2w D-LIO bringup is providing odom -> base_link and base_link -> hesai_lidar TFs.
